## Checklist

- [ ] My entry follows the `- [Name](url) - Description.` format exactly.
- [ ] The linked URL is reachable and points to the correct project or resource.
- [ ] The description is one sentence, starts with a capital letter, and ends with a period.
- [ ] I have placed the entry in the correct section and in alphabetical order.
- [ ] I have read the [contribution guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and my entry meets all quality standards.
- [ ] My addition is not a duplicate of an existing entry.

## Type of Change

<!-- Put an `x` in all boxes that apply. -->

- [ ] New entry (tool, library, or resource)
- [ ] Update to an existing entry (broken link, corrected description, etc.)
- [ ] New section proposal
- [ ] Other (please describe below)
